ab: ya mian do katangked no vahay namen o gako ko, ko mangday so araraw a ya malam a mangey do gako, no ya misiasiay am ko malam a moli do vahay namen.
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: ya alikey o gako namen, ya abo do na ka aro no ya mivatvatek a kakanakan, so namen ipakasingkad do kadoan jiamen.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: namen maloalovot do rako a inaorod no gako namen a ya mibozo a ya mawalawalam.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: sia mai a macialalam jiamen o sinsi, namen akmey a asa ka vahay a ya mian do gako.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: namen mangday so araraw do gako a ya mivias, ta namen pingsanan o saad no namen pacinanaoan a vahay.
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: tatasa ka tao am ya omlinas do pazezevengan, karoan jiamen am ya mivias.
ch: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: mangay do sirisiri no gako namen a ya namen avyasan, namen tominanakman o maciavazavazay namen a ya pivazain, so na kawadwad no gako namen a mangday so araraw.
ch: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.
